_comment: Per-park SVG overrides applied by build-park-svgs.mjs. Entries name a sharp kink in the wall that a smooth bezier through the canonical fence_polyline would over-smooth — the kink reads as the park's signature (Monster, Big Concourse, Crawford boxes). Each entry targets a polyline point by its angle_from_centerline_deg. Kind: 'wall-tick' draws a short perpendicular tick at the point (signals an abrupt wall height step). 'v-notch' inserts a small V into the bezier at the point (signals a wall recess). 'sharp-angle' forces the bezier to break — segments either side of the point are drawn as straight lines instead of curves (signals a wall corner). 'note' is the human label surfaced into park-meta.json.

kinks.note: Monster carries to the LF line
Crawford Boxes — LF wall steps in at 315 ft with a 19 ft face
